description: Generate ShapeWords word clouds as SVG, PNG, or JSON from text or weighted words.
name: io.github.kirrrr-2423/shapewords-mcp

environmentVariables.description: ShapeWords Render API base URL. Defaults to the public ShapeWords service.
environmentVariables.name: SHAPEWORDS_API_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Optional bearer token for protected ShapeWords Render API deployments.
environmentVariables.name: SHAPEWORDS_RENDER_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Maximum time to wait for hosted render jobs, in milliseconds.
environmentVariables.name: SHAPEWORDS_POLL_TIMEOUT_MS

environmentVariables.description: Per-request timeout for ShapeWords API calls, in milliseconds.
environmentVariables.name: SHAPEWORDS_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS

title: ShapeWords MCP
